title: Irish Chocolate Chip Crunchy Crumble
description: A delicious dessert recipe combining crunchy elements, rich chocolate, and a buttery crumble topping. Perfect for satisfying sweet cravings.

ingredients.name: flour
ingredients.notes: Not listed among ingredients but required for the recipe

ingredients.name: sugar
ingredients.notes: Not listed among ingredients but required for the recipe

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the white chocolate chips, crunchy, and irish butter until well combined.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumble and chips.
Add the buttery to the crumble mixture and mix until a crumbly texture forms.
Pour the chocolate mixture into a baking dish.
Top the chocolate mixture with the crumble mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
